title: Nebula's Shorter Swords v1
description: Just the right edge for battle!
body:
![all of nebula's shorter swords next to eachother](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiuC3lxHPnPbZfmM1URbd72Fw-6TmqfmnbJr0OahrvAxkBzZt0Isvx3I5d1aahMtVxG9gJQyJqzymlskUzy7O7QIUXazK93sNCnTtF4a1ui3cueMWrKHbeTu_AgnFIY0WlqqDXRWLUigqLgGAP4wtH8ANFMldqf8k6eNrs6qbYiYwGBaoBizLRu_NjpBdv6/s16000/Nebula's%20Shorter%20Swords%20v.1%20Image.png)

## Why was it made?
To provide **sleek** and **efficient** swords for a better gameplay experience.

## What does it contain?
Swords of all material types **post 1.16**.
